proof fn phi_2_owned_threads_shared_across_containers(pm: ProcessManager, c1: ContainerPtr, c2: ContainerPtr, t: ThreadPtr)
    requires
        pm.container_perms_wf(),
        pm.container_tree_wf(),
        pm.container_dom().contains(c1),
        pm.container_dom().contains(c2),
        c1 != c2,
        pm.get_container(c1).owned_threads@.contains(t),
    ensures
        !pm.get_container(c2).owned_threads@.contains(t),
{
}
reason: Neither `container_perms_wf` nor `container_tree_wf` constrains `owned_threads` disjointness across containers — two distinct containers can claim the same thread via their unconstrained Ghost fields

        pm.container_cpu_wf(),
